title: Athens Coins
description: A simple coin mod for use in quest rewards or player to player trading
body:
Requires the **Architectury API** for Fabric and NeoForge. Fabric version also requires the Fabric API.

This mod adds three coin items to the game.

Bronze, silver and gold coins can all be used as quest rewards or for player to player trades. 

You can craft 9 bronze or silver coins into the higher tier, or craft gold and silver coins down a tier in the crafting grid.

Currently the only way to give the items in game is the give command

/give Player athens_coins:bronze_coin

/give Player athens_coins:silver_coin

/give Player athens_coins:gold_coin
